comments: Machine learning (ML) is a branch of AI where computers learn from data and identify patterns without being explicitly programmed. Instead of writing hardcoded rules, developers feed data into algorithms, allowing the model to make predictions or generate new content on its own.

Django is a free, open-source, high-level Python web framework designed to help developers build secure, scalable, and maintainable web applications quickly. Developed with a "batteries-included" philosophy, it provides almost everything a developer needs right out of the box, eliminating the need to reinvent the wheel for common tasks like user management, form processing, and database connections.
